name: 4-Condition Entry System with Risk Management
description: VWAP-based entry system with EMA confirmation, RSI filter, and position/risk management rules

conditions.name: Price at VWAP
conditions.rule: Price bounces off or holds above VWAP on the 4H
conditions.description: Price must be at or within ±0.5 SD of VWAP

conditions.name: RSI Filter
conditions.rule: RSI is between 40-60 (not overbought, room to run)
conditions.description: RSI in neutral zone - not extreme

conditions.name: EMA Golden Cross
conditions.description: Short EMA above long EMA indicates bullish momentum

conditions.name: Price Cascade
conditions.rule: Price is above 20 EMA on 4H (cascade confirms UP trend)
conditions.description: Price must be above the 20 EMA (baseline trend confirmation)

long_entry.confirmation: All 4 conditions must be TRUE for a valid BUY signal
long_entry.entry_price: At VWAP or first pullback candle close above VWAP

stop_loss.description: Hard stop - exit immediately if hit
stop_loss.rule: Below VWAP - 0.5 SD or below 20 EMA, whichever is lower

conditions.name: Price at VWAP
conditions.rule: Price rejects or breaks below VWAP on the 4H
conditions.description: Price must be at or within ±0.5 SD of VWAP

conditions.name: RSI Filter
conditions.rule: RSI is between 40-60 (not oversold, room to drop)
conditions.description: RSI in neutral zone - not extreme

conditions.name: EMA Dead Cross
conditions.description: Short EMA below long EMA indicates bearish momentum

conditions.name: Price Cascade
conditions.rule: Price is below 20 EMA on 4H (cascade confirms DOWN trend)
conditions.description: Price must be below the 20 EMA (baseline trend confirmation)

short_entry.confirmation: All 4 conditions must be TRUE for a valid SELL signal
short_entry.entry_price: At VWAP or first rejection candle close below VWAP

stop_loss.description: Hard stop - exit immediately if hit
stop_loss.rule: Above VWAP + 0.5 SD or above 20 EMA, whichever is higher

pre_entry_checks.name: Avoid NY Open Volatility
pre_entry_checks.description: Is it NOT the first 15 minutes of NY Open?
pre_entry_checks.rule: Do not enter within 15 minutes of NY 08:00 EST

pre_entry_checks.name: Position Limit
pre_entry_checks.description: Do I have less than 2 open positions?

pre_entry_checks.name: Risk Per Trade
pre_entry_checks.description: Is my risk per trade 0.25%-1% of account?
pre_entry_checks.rule: Size position so risk does not exceed 1% of account, minimum 0.25%

pre_entry_checks.name: Daily Loss Limit
pre_entry_checks.description: Have I NOT had 2 losing trades today?
pre_entry_checks.rule: Stop trading after 2 consecutive losing trades in a day

pre_entry_checks.name: Daily Profit Cap
pre_entry_checks.description: Am I within my daily profit cap?
pre_entry_checks.rule: Do not exceed daily profit target
pre_entry_checks.note: Suggested to close trading for the day once target is hit

during_entry_checks.name: All Entry Conditions
during_entry_checks.rule: Every condition must be confirmed before entry

during_entry_checks.name: Price at VWAP
during_entry_checks.description: Is price at or near VWAP (within ±0.5 SD)?

during_entry_checks.name: Risk/Reward Ratio
during_entry_checks.description: Am I using 1:2 minimum R:R ratio?

during_entry_checks.name: Targets Pre-Set
during_entry_checks.description: Did I set stop and targets BEFORE entering?

during_trade_checks.name: Stop Loss Confirmed
during_trade_checks.description: Is my stop loss set at the exact price?
during_trade_checks.rule: Verify stop is placed at exact level

during_trade_checks.name: Targets Confirmed
during_trade_checks.description: Are my targets set at exact prices?
during_trade_checks.rule: Verify targets are placed at exact levels

during_trade_checks.name: Do Not Move Stop Early
during_trade_checks.description: Am I NOT moving my stop into profit (yet)?
during_trade_checks.rule: Let trade breathe - do not tighten stop until trade confirms

during_trade_checks.name: Exit Discipline
during_trade_checks.description: Am I ready to exit at targets, not hold for more?
during_trade_checks.rule: Take profits as planned, no exceptions

take_profit.name: Take Profit at Targets
take_profit.rule: Exit at predetermined targets. Do not hold for more
take_profit.action: Exit 50% at target 1, remaining 50% at target 2

stop_loss.name: Hard Stop Loss
stop_loss.rule: Exit immediately if stop is hit. No exceptions

time_exit.name: Time-Based Exit
time_exit.rule: If trade hasn't moved in 4 hours, exit at breakeven or VWAP

session_exit.name: Session Close Exit
session_exit.rule: Close all positions 30 min before NY Close (2:30 PM NY time)
session_exit.note: Avoid overnight gaps and after-hours volatility
